# Punto Reforma Barcelona

> Architecture and total renovations in Barcelona — for homes, apartments and commercial spaces. Custom carpentry, prime kitchens and bathrooms, project management and permits, from first idea to handover. One responsible contact throughout.

> Arquitectura de interiores y reformas integrales en Barcelona — para viviendas, pisos y locales comerciales. Carpintería a medida, cocinas y baños prime, coordinación de obra y gestión de permisos, desde la primera idea hasta la entrega. Un solo interlocutor responsable durante todo el proceso.

Brand: Punto Reforma (one-word wordmark: Puntoreforma). This site is Punto Reforma Barcelona, part of the Punto Reforma network.

## Contact

- Website: https://barcelona.puntoreforma.es/
- Email: info@puntoreforma.es
- Phone: +34 662 411 064
- Location: Barcelona, Spain

## Services

- Reforma integral & gestión de obra — complete renovations for homes, apartments and commercial spaces, from first concept to handover
- Arquitectura & diseño — architecture, layout, material direction and design decisions for renovation projects
- Cocinas & baños prime — kitchens and bathrooms designed as central parts of the renovation
- Carpintería a medida & metal — bespoke wardrobes, storage, built-ins, furniture and custom metal constructions
- Comprobaciones técnicas & permisos — technical checks, permit coordination and procedures

## Pages

- [Home](https://barcelona.puntoreforma.es/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://barcelona.puntoreforma.es/blog/): Renovation guides and articles for Barcelona

## Blog Articles

- [Carpintería a medida en Barcelona](https://barcelona.puntoreforma.es/blog/carpinteria-a-medida-barcelona/): Custom carpentry in Barcelona: built-in wardrobes, shelving and furniture for Eixample, Gràcia and Poblenou flats. Materials, prices and timelines.
- [Licencias de obras en Barcelona](https://barcelona.puntoreforma.es/blog/licencias-obras-barcelona/): Complete guide to building permits in Barcelona: assabentat, comunicació prèvia and llicència d'obres — which you need and how to apply.
- [Pintura en Barcelona: color y acabados](https://barcelona.puntoreforma.es/blog/pintura-barcelona-color-acabados/): How to choose paint, colour and finishes for your renovation in Barcelona. Surface preparation, techniques and professional results.
- [Reforma de baño en Barcelona: precio](https://barcelona.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-barcelona-precio/): Bathroom renovation prices in Barcelona in 2026: breakdown by scope, waterproofing, community rules and what raises the cost.
- [Reforma de baño en comunidad Barcelona](https://barcelona.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-comunidad-barcelona/): How to renovate a bathroom in a Barcelona building: shared drainage, ventilation shunts, community rules and permits to check.
- [Reforma de cocina en Barcelona: precio](https://barcelona.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-cocina-barcelona-precio/): Kitchen renovation prices in Barcelona in 2026: layout options, custom carpentry, appliances and realistic timelines.
- [Reforma integral en Barcelona: precio](https://barcelona.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-integral-barcelona-precio/): What a full renovation in Barcelona costs in 2026: price by scope, project management, permits and completion timeline.
- [Reforma piso antiguo en Barcelona](https://barcelona.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-piso-antiguo-barcelona/): How to renovate an old flat in Barcelona, especially in Eixample and Gràcia: outdated installations, structural checks, permits and costs.
- [Reforma de piso en Barcelona: coste y plazos](https://barcelona.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-piso-barcelona/): Practical guide to renovating a flat in Barcelona: costs, timelines, building community rules, permits and technical documentation.
